name: Asparagus with Hazelnuts & Tarragon Vinaigret
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Baby lettuce or inner leaves of curly endive
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour water into a large pot to a depth of 1 inch and bring to boil.
2. Place asparagus on steamer rack set over water in the pot.
3. Cover the pot and steam until asparagus is crisp-tender, about 4 minutes.
4. Transfer asparagus to a bowl of ice water and cool. Drain.
5. Place asparagus on paper towels. (Can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead. Cover and refrigerate.)
6. Combine shallots, vinegar, tarragon, and mustard in a bowl.
7. Gradually whisk in oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
8. Place baby lettuce on a large platter. Arrange asparagus atop the lettuce.
9. Drizzle with vinaigrette.
10. Sprinkle with hazelnuts.
